name: Salesforce
one_line: Enterprise cloud CRM and sales platform with a large API ecosystem.
self_serve_detail: Sign up for a free Salesforce Developer Edition org; create an External Client App (or connected app) in Setup to obtain a consumer key/secret and OAuth scopes. No paid plan or human approval is required to get API credentials.
api_surface: REST broad (plus SOAP, Bulk, many specialized APIs)

name: HubSpot
one_line: Inbound CRM, marketing, and sales platform with open RESTful APIs.
self_serve_detail: Create a free HubSpot account (no paid plan needed); create an app to get OAuth client ID/secret, or a private app access token (Bearer). Free developer account includes test accounts and API access.

name: Pipedrive
one_line: CRM platform with broad REST API (v1/v2) + developer sandbox.
self_serve_detail: Free developer sandbox at developers.pipedrive.com; create draft app for OAuth client_id/secret or use personal API token from settings - no approval.

name: Attio
one_line: AI-native relationship/CRM platform with a flexible object-based data model.
self_serve_detail: Free plan (3 seats, 50k records, free forever); admin self-generates API key or registers OAuth app at build.attio.com - no approval.
api_surface: REST broad (records/objects, lists, notes, tasks, webhooks, SCIM) + SQL + App SDK

name: Twenty
one_line: Open-source, developer-friendly CRM with GraphQL and REST APIs.
self_serve_detail: Create an API key in workspace Settings -> API & Webhooks (available on free Cloud workspaces); keys are Bearer tokens scoping to roles. No paid plan or approval required for API access.

name: Podio
one_line: Customizable work-management and CRM app platform.
self_serve_detail: Register an app at podio.com/settings/api to get a client ID/secret for OAuth2. The Podio API is free for both free and premium accounts; no paid plan or approval needed. App-authentication (app id/token) and password flows also available.

name: Zoho CRM
one_line: Cloud CRM for sales, marketing, and customer support.
self_serve_detail: Sign up for a free Zoho account; register a client (Self Client) in the Zoho API Console to get a client ID/secret, generate a grant token, and exchange it for OAuth2 access/refresh tokens. No paid plan or approval required.

name: Close
one_line: Close is a sales CRM built around calling, email, SMS, and pipeline management.
self_serve_detail: Create an API key in Settings → Developer → API Keys in any Close account (paid; free trial available). No approval. OAuth 2.0 apps also registerable for user-facing integrations.

name: Copper
one_line: CRM for Google Workspace with REST Developer API.
self_serve_detail: API keys fully self-serve (System settings -> API Keys); OAuth2 app registration gated (contact Copper). Needs a paid Copper account (free trial available).
api_surface: REST broad (leads, people, opportunities, activities, webhooks)

name: DealCloud
one_line: Financial-services deal/relationship platform (Intapp).
self_serve_detail: Requires an enterprise DealCloud/Intapp tenant; admin enables 'API' capability and issues API keys / OAuth2 client-credentials. No free public signup.
blocker: Requires an enterprise DealCloud/Intapp tenant (acquired via sales); admin self-enables API within tenant.

name: Zendesk
one_line: Zendesk is a customer support and helpdesk platform for ticketing and omnichannel service.
self_serve_detail: Admin generates API tokens in Admin Center → Apps and integrations → APIs → API tokens (token access must be enabled first). Free trial; no human approval. Multi-customer apps must register a global OAuth client.
api_surface: REST broad (Support, Talk, Chat, Guide, Help Center)

name: Intercom
one_line: Customer messaging/support platform with REST API + official MCP.
self_serve_detail: Create app in Developer Hub; instantly get Bearer Access Token for your workspace; OAuth auto-approved for TEST app (no review).

name: Freshdesk
one_line: Freshdesk is a cloud-based customer support/helpdesk platform with ticketing, omnichannel, and knowledge base.
self_serve_detail: API key found in user Profile Settings. API access is disabled on the free Sprout plan; a paid plan (Growth/Pro/Enterprise) or trial is required. No human approval.

name: Front
one_line: Front is a customer operations platform / shared inbox for collaborative support and messaging.
self_serve_detail: Company admin generates API tokens in settings, or creates an OAuth app (client ID/secret) in developer settings. Free trial; no human approval. Public integrations must use OAuth.

name: Pylon
one_line: B2B support/operations platform unifying Slack, Teams, email, chat into ticketing.
self_serve_detail: API token self-serve from dashboard (Settings -> API tokens) but requires an active Pylon workspace (paid, sales-led onboarding); Admin role.
api_surface: REST broad (issues, accounts, contacts, KB, webhooks); OpenAPI published
blocker: Requires an active (paid) Pylon workspace + Admin role to mint an API token.

name: LiveAgent
one_line: LiveAgent is a multichannel help desk, live chat, and call center support software.
self_serve_detail: Admin generates an API key in Configuration → System → API (v3). 14-day free trial; no human approval. Built-in MCP access token generated in user profile.

name: Plain
one_line: API-first customer support and helpdesk platform (GraphQL).
self_serve_detail: Start a 7-day free trial (no credit card), create a workspace, then generate an API key at Settings → API Keys; no app review. Sustained API access requires a paid plan after the trial.

name: Help Scout
one_line: Shared-inbox customer support helpdesk with inbox, chat, and docs APIs.
self_serve_detail: Create an OAuth2 app at Profile → My Apps (self-serve, no review) to get Client ID/Secret; use client_credentials or auth-code flow. API access is gated to paid plans (free trial, no card; free plan is capped).

name: Gorgias
one_line: E-commerce helpdesk with documented REST API.
self_serve_detail: Private-app API keys self-serve (Settings -> REST API); auth HTTP Basic. Public apps need app review (gated). Needs paid Helpdesk plan (free trial).

name: Gladly
one_line: Cloud customer-service / contact-center platform.
self_serve_detail: Requires a paid Gladly org; admin grants 'API User' permission and generates API tokens in the UI. No free self-serve.
api_surface: REST broad (conversations, customers, tasks, agents, webhooks)
blocker: Requires a paid Gladly tenant; admin issues API token.

name: Slack
one_line: Team messaging and collaboration platform with broad Web/Events APIs.
self_serve_detail: Create an app at api.slack.com/apps (free, no approval), configure scopes, and install to a workspace to obtain bot/user tokens. Free tier is sufficient for API use.

name: Twilio
one_line: Programmable communications (messaging, voice, verify) + official MCP.
self_serve_detail: Free 30-day trial -> Account SID + Auth Token + API keys from Console; trial limited (verified numbers); full API needs paid upgrade.

name: Zoho Cliq
one_line: Team chat and collaboration tool within the Zoho suite, with a REST API.
self_serve_detail: Register an app in the Zoho API Console (self-serve) to get Client ID/Secret, then run the OAuth2 auth-code/refresh-token flow. Free plan includes API support.

name: Lark (Larksuite)
one_line: Enterprise collaboration suite (messaging, docs, calendar) with an Open Platform API.
self_serve_detail: Create a custom app in the Lark Developer Console (free) to get App ID/Secret; obtain a tenant_access_token via app credentials (no user consent needed) or user_access_token via OAuth. Free tier available.

name: Pumble
one_line: Team messaging and collaboration platform (Slack alternative) by CAKE.com with an app/API and event system.
self_serve_detail: Create an app/addon from scratch in Pumble workspace settings (free plan supported), choose user/bot scopes, install, then copy the App key plus user/bot tokens. OAuth2 authorization-code flow; no human approval required.
api_surface: REST broad (api-ga.pumble.com v3) plus WebSocket events

name: Discord
one_line: Chat/voice/gaming community platform exposing a REST HTTP API plus a WebSocket Gateway for bots and OAuth2 apps.
self_serve_detail: Create an app free in the Discord Developer Portal; a bot token is issued instantly and OAuth2 client_id/secret are free. Privileged intents (e.g., message content) require a toggle/approval, but basic API use needs no human review.

name: Telegram
one_line: Cloud messaging platform whose Bot API lets developers build bots via @BotFather.
self_serve_detail: Message @BotFather with /newbot and immediately receive a free bot token; no approval or review. The token authenticates every Bot API call via https://api.telegram.org/bot<token>/<method>.
api_surface: HTTPS Bot API (simple REST-style, broad method coverage)

name: WhatsApp Business
one_line: Meta-hosted WhatsApp Business messaging API.
self_serve_detail: Dev/test: free Meta app + temporary token (no cost). Production needs Meta Business verification, permanent System User token, billing; test capped at 5 recipients.
blocker: Production needs Meta Business verification + billing; dev/test capped at temporary token + 5 test recipients.

name: Aircall
one_line: Cloud phone system with RESTful Public API.
self_serve_detail: Customer API keys self-serve (Company Settings -> API Keys) -> api_id+api_token as Basic auth. OAuth2 for partners (gated). Needs paid plan (free trial).

name: Vonage
one_line: Communications APIs (SMS, voice, verify).
self_serve_detail: Free account (no card); API key + secret issued in dashboard; EUR2 demo credit. Auth via Basic (key:secret) or JWT bearer.
api_surface: REST broad (Voice, Messages, Verify, Numbers, Video)

name: Google Ads
one_line: Google's advertising API for programmatically managing campaigns, ads, and reporting.
self_serve_detail: Sign up for a developer token in the Google Ads API Center (free); Test Account Access is auto-granted with no review. Calling production accounts requires applying for Basic/Standard Access, which needs approval/review (typically 5-10 business days; Explorer Access sometimes auto-granted). The API itself is free to use.
blocker: Production access requires App Review approval of the developer token (Basic/Standard Access); only Test Account Access is auto-granted.

name: Meta Ads
one_line: Meta's Marketing API for managing Facebook/Instagram ads, audiences, and reporting.
self_serve_detail: Add the Marketing API product to a free Meta app; Limited access is auto-granted and standard access to ads_read/ads_management for your own ad account is auto-approved. Advanced access (managing other businesses' accounts) and Tech Provider status require App Review plus Business Verification. The official MCP (mcp.facebook.com/ads) gives OAuth access to your own account with no App Review.
blocker: Advanced access (managing other businesses' ad accounts) and Tech Provider status require App Review + Business Verification; full third-party use is gated, though own-account access via the official MCP needs no review.

name: LinkedIn Ads
one_line: LinkedIn Marketing/Advertising API.
self_serve_detail: Self-create Developer Portal app (OAuth client) + verify Company Page; Advertising API access requires manual human review (slow, discretionary).
blocker: Advertising API access granted only after LinkedIn's manual application review (slow, no appeal).

name: GoHighLevel
one_line: White-label CRM/agency platform with v2 REST API + official MCP.
self_serve_detail: Free developer account yields OAuth client; calling API / Private Integration Token needs Unlimited ($297) or SaaS Pro ($497) plan; Starter lacks API.
api_surface: REST v2 broad (contacts, conversations, opportunities, calendars)
blocker: API / MCP require paid Unlimited or SaaS Pro plan (Starter lacks API access).

name: Mailchimp
one_line: Email marketing platform for campaigns, automation, and audience management
self_serve_detail: Create a (free) Mailchimp account, then generate an API key in Account > API Keys with no human approval; OAuth2 app flow available for third-party access.
api_surface: REST broad (Marketing v3, hundreds of endpoints)

name: Klaviyo
one_line: Email and SMS marketing automation platform with data-science-driven segmentation
self_serve_detail: Log in (free/test account) and generate a private API key or register a public OAuth app; no human approval to obtain credentials.
api_surface: REST broad (JSON:API: profiles, lists, campaigns, flows, metrics, catalogs)

name: systeme.io
one_line: All-in-one marketing/business platform with public REST API + official MCP.
self_serve_detail: API keys self-serve on free plan (Settings -> Public API keys). Auth Bearer token. Some higher-tier endpoints may need paid plan.
api_surface: REST limited-but-useful (contacts, tags, newsletters, subscriptions, webhooks)

name: Pinterest
one_line: Visual discovery and ads platform; API for Pins, Boards, ads, catalogs, and conversions
self_serve_detail: Create a business account, accept Developer TOS, then submit a Connect app request form; Trial access (app ID/secret) is granted only after human review (each business day). Standard/production access, including creating Pins, requires a second review with an OAuth demo video.
blocker: App review required for Trial access to obtain OAuth credentials; production write endpoints (e.g. Pin creation) require a second Standard-access review with a demo video.

name: Threads (Meta)
one_line: Meta Threads Graph API (publish/read/replies).
self_serve_detail: Free: create Meta app with Threads use case; in Dev mode app owners/testers exchange OAuth for tokens with NO App Review. Production advanced scopes need App Review + business verification.
api_surface: REST moderate (profile, media, publish, replies, insights)

name: SendGrid
one_line: Transactional and marketing email delivery API (Twilio SendGrid)
self_serve_detail: Free SendGrid plan lets you create API keys in the dashboard (Settings > API Keys) with scoped permissions; no human approval. Some features (dedicated IP, subusers) need paid tiers.
api_surface: REST broad (v3: mail, suppressions, marketing, stats)

name: Shopify
one_line: Ecommerce platform with Admin API for products, orders, customers, and store management
self_serve_detail: Free Partner account + dev store; create a custom app in the admin to get an access token (X-Shopify-Access-Token) with no approval, or build a public app via OAuth. No paid plan required to obtain credentials.

name: WooCommerce
one_line: Open-source WordPress ecommerce plugin with a built-in REST API.
self_serve_detail: Free core plugin; generate Consumer Key/Secret in WooCommerce > Settings > Advanced > REST API with Read/Write perms in your own store, no cost or approval.
api_surface: REST broad (products, orders, customers, reports, webhooks)

name: BigCommerce
one_line: Hosted SaaS ecommerce platform with REST and GraphQL APIs.
self_serve_detail: Sign up for a free trial store, then create store-level API account in Settings > API Accounts to get a static access_token (X-Auth-Token); no approval, but live production needs a paid plan. App-level OAuth2 via Developer Portal for public apps.

name: Salesforce Commerce Cloud
one_line: Enterprise headless commerce platform (B2C Commerce / SCAPI).
self_serve_detail: SCAPI free for B2C Commerce customers, but real credentials require a licensed enterprise instance via Salesforce sales/partners; public demo sandbox is read-only.
api_surface: REST very broad (SCAPI Shopper + Admin, OCAPI)
blocker: Real API credentials require a licensed B2C Commerce instance (enterprise contract); no self-serve production access.

name: Magento (Adobe Commerce)
one_line: Enterprise ecommerce platform (Adobe Commerce PaaS/SaaS and free Magento Open Source).
self_serve_detail: Adobe Commerce proper requires a paid license. Magento Open Source is free and self-hostable: create an Integration in Admin (System > Integrations) to get OAuth 1.0a consumer key/secret + access token/secret with no approval.
api_surface: REST broad + GraphQL (catalog, sales, customers, CMS)

name: Squarespace
one_line: Website/commerce builder; Commerce REST APIs via API key/OAuth.
self_serve_detail: Free API key from Settings -> Developer API Keys, but Commerce APIs need paid Commerce Advanced plan; OAuth for Extensions gated behind a contact form.
blocker: Commerce API key needs paid Commerce Advanced plan; OAuth path gated behind a form.

name: Ecwid
one_line: Lightspeed-owned hosted ecommerce platform with a REST API.
self_serve_detail: API access requires a paid store plan (Venture/Business/Unlimited). A custom app in the store's app dashboard yields non-expiring secret/public tokens (Bearer) and client_id/secret; developers can email Ecwid for a free dev-plan upgrade, but no fully open free self-serve path.
api_surface: REST broad (catalog, orders, customers, payments, shipping)

name: Gumroad
one_line: Creator-commerce platform for selling digital products and memberships.
self_serve_detail: Free: create an application in account Settings > Advanced > Applications and generate an access token (Bearer) instantly; no approval or paid plan required. OAuth2 flows (auth code, password, client credentials) also supported.

name: Amazon Selling Partner
one_line: Amazon marketplace API (SP-API) for sellers/vendors.
self_serve_detail: Register as SP-API developer (identity verification: gov ID, business license, bank, video), request + get approved for data roles; public apps pass architecture/Appstore review. Auth via LWA OAuth2.
api_surface: REST very broad (30+ sections: orders, catalog, inventory, reports, finances)
blocker: Identity verification + role approval + (public apps) architecture/Appstore review before production; needs Amazon selling account.

name: fanbasis
one_line: Merchant-of-record payments platform (rebranding to Commas) with REST API + MCP (beta).
self_serve_detail: Seller account -> Account -> API Keys for scoped key. Public API reference browsable; QA sandbox available. Live payments need KYC/business verification.
blocker: MCP in beta; live payments need KYC/business verification.

name: DataForSEO
one_line: SEO/SEM data APIs (SERP, backlinks, keywords).
self_serve_detail: Free account (no card); API login + auto-generated password in API Access tab; free Sandbox + $1 trial credit.
api_surface: REST very broad (SERP, Backlinks, Keywords, On-Page, Labs)

name: SE Ranking
one_line: SEO platform exposing a Data API (keywords, backlinks, domains, AI search) and Project API for managing SEO campaigns.
self_serve_detail: Start a 14-day free trial that includes 100,000 free API credits; generate the API key from the API Dashboard (Profile & Preferences > API Dashboard). Sustained/production Data API access requires an Essential+ paid plan (monthly credit allowance) or a standalone API plan (from $2,148/yr). No human approval needed.

name: Ahrefs
one_line: SEO toolset API (Site Explorer, backlinks) for subscribers.
self_serve_detail: API keys in Account Settings, but API only on eligible paid plans; free account limited to test queries + 2 public endpoints.
api_surface: REST v3 broad but gated to paid; minimal free public endpoints
blocker: API + MCP require an eligible paid plan (Lite ~$119/mo+).

name: MrScraper
one_line: AI-powered web scraping platform with a REST API and hosted MCP server for natural-language data extraction.
self_serve_detail: Sign up at the dashboard; an API token is auto-created (also generate new tokens under profile > API Tokens). Authenticate via x-api-token header or Authorization: Bearer. New accounts include free trial credits; ongoing scraping consumes plan tokens, so real volume requires a paid plan.

name: Apify
one_line: Web scraping and automation platform exposing a REST API to run Actors and read datasets/key-value stores.
self_serve_detail: Create a free account (no card) that includes $5 of free platform credit; grab the API token from the Integrations page in Apify Console. Token is used as Authorization: Bearer or ?token= query param. Usage beyond free credit is pay-as-you-go.

name: Firecrawl
one_line: API to scrape, crawl, and extract structured/LLM-ready web data with built-in anti-bot and JS rendering.
self_serve_detail: Create a free account to get an API key (fc-...) from firecrawl.dev/app/api-keys; also offers a keyless free tier (rate-limited per IP) on the API and MCP. Authenticate with Authorization: Bearer fc-KEY. Paid plans raise rate limits and tool access.

name: Bright Data
one_line: Proxy and web-data platform providing scraping, SERP, Web Unlocker APIs and a managed remote MCP server.
self_serve_detail: Create a Bright Data account; an API token is auto-generated (also in user settings). New users receive free credit for testing (MCP includes 5,000 free requests/month). Authenticate via Authorization: Bearer or token query param. Pay-as-you-go after free credit.

name: Sherlock
one_line: Open-source CLI that finds a username across 400+ social networks (OSINT).
self_serve_detail: No account or key needed: install via pipx install sherlock-project or run the Docker image. It is a local Python CLI with no hosted API or credentials.
api_surface: No hosted API; Python CLI only

name: Waterfall.io
one_line: B2B enrichment/GTM API across 30+ data vendors.
self_serve_detail: API key 'provided in your contract'; docs say 'contact your account manager' / 'book a call'. No public self-serve key path.
api_surface: REST async job-based enrichment (Prospector, Contact/Company, Search)
blocker: No documented self-serve credential path; key requires a contract / sales conversation.

name: Clay
one_line: GTM data platform: people/company search, enrichment, workflows.
self_serve_detail: Self-serve 'clay-api-key' under Settings -> Account -> API keys (beta) within a Clay account (paid SaaS w/ limited free tier); API usage consumes credits.

name: GitHub
one_line: Git-based source-control and developer platform with repos, issues, PRs, and CI.
self_serve_detail: Free GitHub account; generate a Personal Access Token (classic or fine-grained) in Settings > Developer settings with no approval. OAuth Apps / GitHub Apps for acting on behalf of users.

name: Vercel
one_line: Platform API to manage Vercel projects/deployments/domains.
self_serve_detail: Free Vercel account -> Access Token (Bearer) from dashboard, or OAuth app. Free tier sufficient.
api_surface: REST broad (projects, deployments, domains, env, teams)

name: Netlify
one_line: Hosting/platform for building, deploying, and serving web apps and static sites.
self_serve_detail: Free account; generate a Personal Access Token (Bearer) in User Settings > Applications > Personal access tokens, no approval. Register an OAuth app for public integrations.

name: Cloudflare
one_line: CDN, DNS, security, and edge/compute platform (Workers, R2, etc.).
self_serve_detail: Free account; create API Tokens (Bearer) in My Profile > API Tokens, or use the Global API Key + email header. No human approval required.

name: Supabase
one_line: Open-source Firebase alternative: hosted Postgres, Auth, Storage, and Edge Functions.
self_serve_detail: Free project; API keys (anon publishable + service_role secret JWT) are shown in Project Settings > API Keys, no approval. Personal Access Token for the Management API in account tokens.

name: Neo4j
one_line: Graph database platform (Cypher/HTTP API + Aura cloud).
self_serve_detail: Aura free tier (no card) yields instance creds; self-managed needs server setup. Bearer via SSO; auth can be disabled.

name: Snowflake
one_line: Cloud data warehouse (SQL + REST + Cortex AI).
self_serve_detail: Self-serve 30-day trial yields credentials; REST auth via OAuth2, key-pair JWT, PAT. Full API use needs an account (trial/paid).

name: MongoDB Atlas
one_line: Atlas Administration API for orgs/projects/clusters.
self_serve_detail: Free Atlas account (M0 free tier) -> OAuth2 service account or Digest API keys from dashboard.

name: Datadog
one_line: Cloud-scale monitoring, observability, and security analytics platform.
self_serve_detail: Free-tier account (no card) via signup; generate API key (DD-API-KEY) and Application key (DD-APPLICATION-KEY) in Organization Settings > API Keys / Application Keys. Both headers sent per request.
api_surface: REST broad (v1/v2, metrics, logs, monitors, dashboards, incidents, security)

name: Sentry
one_line: Error tracking, crash reporting, and application performance monitoring for developers.
self_serve_detail: Free-tier account via signup; create a personal/org auth token (Sentry-Bearer) at Settings > User > API Auth Tokens or via internal integration. OAuth2 app also self-serve for third-party apps.
api_surface: REST broad (issues, events, projects, orgs, releases)

name: Notion
one_line: All-in-one workspace for notes, docs, databases, and project wikis.
self_serve_detail: Free account; create a personal access token (ntn_*) at notion.so/developers/tokens or an internal integration token at notion.so/profile/integrations. OAuth for public apps. Business/Enterprise may restrict PAT creation by policy.
api_surface: REST broad (pages, databases, blocks, users, comments, search)

name: Airtable
one_line: Web API to read/write Airtable base records/schema.
self_serve_detail: Free account -> Personal Access Token (/create/tokens) or OAuth integration. Free plan sufficient.

name: Linear
one_line: Fast issue tracking and project management tool for software teams.
self_serve_detail: Free plan includes API access; generate a personal API key (lin_api_*) at Settings > Account > Security & Access, or create an OAuth2 app at Settings > API > Applications for user-delegated access.
api_surface: GraphQL (single broad graph; issues, projects, teams, comments)

name: Jira
one_line: Atlassian's issue tracking and agile project management platform.
self_serve_detail: Free Atlassian Cloud tier; create an API token (Basic auth: email + token) at id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens. OAuth 2.0 (3LO / client credentials) self-serve via developer.atlassian.com. MCP API-token auth needs an org admin to enable the Rovo MCP setting; OAuth path is self-serve.
api_surface: REST broad (Cloud REST v3, JQL, Agile, Service Management)

name: Asana
one_line: Work management platform for planning, tracking, and managing tasks and projects.
self_serve_detail: Generate a Personal Access Token (PAT) in the Asana developer console (app.asana.com/0/my-apps) after free sign-up; OAuth apps also registered there with no human approval or review.

name: Monday.com
one_line: Work OS / project management (single GraphQL API).
self_serve_detail: Free no-expiry developer account gives a personal V2 API token; OAuth 2.1 client-credentials self-serve in Developer Center - no approval.
api_surface: GraphQL single endpoint (boards, items, users, apps, automations)

name: ClickUp
one_line: PM platform with public REST API (v2) + official MCP.
self_serve_detail: Free account -> personal API token (Settings -> ClickUp API) or OAuth app. API on all plans.
api_surface: REST v2 broad (tasks, spaces, docs, time, webhooks)

name: Coda
one_line: Document and workspace collaboration tool (now Superhuman Docs) with docs, tables, and apps.
self_serve_detail: Generate a free API token from coda.io/account API settings; the API is free for all users in both free and paid workspaces, no approval required.

name: Smartsheet
one_line: Work-management platform (sheets/projects) with REST API.
self_serve_detail: Personal API access token in-app (Account -> Personal Settings -> API Access) free, no approval; OAuth app via Developer Tools. Needs a Smartsheet account (free trial).

name: Harvest
one_line: Time tracking and invoicing software for teams and freelancers.
self_serve_detail: Create a free Harvest account (a forever-free plan is available) and generate a Personal Access Token at id.getharvest.com/developers; OAuth2 app registration is also free, with no approval.

name: Stripe
one_line: Online payment processing and financial infrastructure platform.
self_serve_detail: Sign up for a free Stripe account and grab test-mode API keys (sk_test_) from the Dashboard immediately; no paid plan or approval needed for test/sandbox use (live mode requires account activation).

name: Plaid
one_line: Financial-data aggregation API (Link, Auth, Transactions).
self_serve_detail: Free sandbox client_id + secret instantly from Plaid Dashboard (no approval). Production access requires a separate request via Dashboard.
api_surface: REST very broad (Link, Auth, Transactions, Identity, Transfer)
blocker: Production access requires an approval request via Dashboard (instant sandbox for dev/test).

name: Binance
one_line: Cryptocurrency exchange offering spot, margin, futures, and market-data APIs.
self_serve_detail: To create API keys you must register a Binance account, enable 2FA, complete identity verification (KYC), and make a deposit to activate the account, then generate HMAC/Ed25519 keys in API Management. Public market-data endpoints are open with no auth.
blocker: API key issuance is gated behind KYC identity verification, 2FA, and a deposit to activate the account (per Binance support FAQ).

name: Paygent Connect
one_line: Japanese payment gateway (Paygent) Connect, requires merchant onboarding.
self_serve_detail: Apply as merchant, submit notarized docs, pass per-payment-institution review; credentials issued post-contract. Sandbox + production separate applications.
blocker: Requires merchant contract + per-payment-institution review; no instant self-serve credentials.

name: iPayX
one_line: Rail-agnostic FX forensic audit layer that detects hidden bank markups on B2B cross-border payments.
self_serve_detail: Get a free API key/Bearer token from ipayx.ai; mid-market rate tools work with no key, but live provider comparisons and full forensic reports require the free Bearer token from the dashboard.

name: QuickBooks
one_line: Cloud accounting/bookkeeping platform with a broad REST + GraphQL API for QuickBooks Online.
self_serve_detail: Create a free Intuit Developer account, create an app to get Client ID/Secret, and use free sandbox companies + the OAuth 2.0 Playground for testing; production keys require app review only if you publish to the app store.

name: Xero
one_line: Cloud accounting platform with a broad REST API for small-business finance and payroll.
self_serve_detail: Sign up for a free Xero developer account, register an app to get client id/secret, and develop against the free demo company; OAuth 2.0 is required for all new integrations.

name: Brex
one_line: Unified business spend platform (cards, expenses, bills).
self_serve_detail: API tokens self-serve in Brex Dashboard (Settings -> Developer) by admin, but only for approved/verified Brex business customers. Official MCP needs 'Brex in AI assistants' beta + Developer API agreement.
api_surface: REST broad (Accounting, Expenses, Payments, Travel, Webhooks)
blocker: Requires an approved/verified Brex business account to obtain tokens (customer-only).

name: Ramp
one_line: Corporate cards and spend-management platform with a developer API for expenses, bills, reimbursements, and travel.
self_serve_detail: In a Ramp account (free for businesses; admin access) go to Company → Developer → Create New App for Client ID/Secret; Client Credentials grant for own-org access, sandbox via demo-api.ramp.com. Third-party multi-org connections use the partner Applications flow.
api_surface: REST broad (expenses, bills, reimbursements, travel, apps)

name: PitchBook
one_line: Private-markets research data via RESTful Direct Data API (contract).
self_serve_detail: API standalone offering requiring a contract; request via Direct Data team or (clients) Platform -> Plugins & Apps. Credentials via account manager post-contract.
api_surface: REST broad (companies, funds, deals, investors) - contract-scoped
blocker: API access requires a standalone contract; no self-serve or free signup.

name: NotebookLM
one_line: Google source-grounded AI research assistant (Enterprise API).
self_serve_detail: Consumer NotebookLM has no public API. NotebookLM Enterprise API (Google Cloud) requires a GCP project with NotebookLM Enterprise enabled (paid/enterprise) + Bearer token.
blocker: No consumer public API; Enterprise API requires Google Cloud NotebookLM Enterprise enrollment (paid/enterprise).

name: Otter AI
one_line: AI meeting notetaker that transcribes, summarizes, and extracts action items from conversations.
self_serve_detail: Public API is limited to Enterprise workspaces; API keys are created self-serve under Integrations → Developer, but access must be enabled by your Otter account manager if the feature is not visible in your workspace.
api_surface: REST limited (channels, conversations, transcripts, audio, webhooks)
blocker: Requires an Enterprise (paid) Otter workspace and account-manager enablement to access the API.

name: Fathom
one_line: AI meeting recorder with public REST API + official MCP.
self_serve_detail: Free fathom.video account -> user-level API key (Settings -> API Access) or OAuth app. Docs browsable publicly.
api_surface: REST read-focused (meetings, recordings, transcripts, summaries, webhooks)

name: Consensus
one_line: AI search engine that returns cited, peer-reviewed research papers via API and MCP.
self_serve_detail: API is application-only with a custom quote (baseline ~$0.10/call + platform fee); submit a request-access form, no self-serve key issuance. The MCP is free and needs no account to try.

name: Reducto
one_line: Agentic document-processing API for parsing, extracting, splitting, classifying and editing PDFs/files.
self_serve_detail: Sign up for a free studio.reducto.ai account, create an API key in the sidebar (free tier + pay-as-you-go Standard plan). No approval needed.
api_surface: REST broad (parse, extract, split, classify, edit, upload)

name: Devin
one_line: AI software engineer; API manages sessions, knowledge, playbooks and orchestration programmatically.
self_serve_detail: Requires a Devin (paid) account/org; in Settings > Service users create a service user and generate a cog_ API key. Service user keys are generally available; personal access tokens are closed beta (contact support).
api_surface: REST broad (v3 orgs/enterprise: sessions, knowledge, playbooks, schedules)

name: higgsfield
one_line: AI media generation platform (images, video, 3D, audio) via CLI, REST Cloud API and MCP.
self_serve_detail: Sign up for a free Higgsfield account (new accounts get free credits); CLI higgsfield auth login or Cloud API key/secret from cloud.higgsfield.ai. Paid plans unlock higher volume/longer durations/broader models.
api_surface: REST broad (per-model generate, soul, upload, voices) + CLI

name: Mermaid CLI
one_line: CLI rendering Mermaid diagrams locally; no remote API.
self_serve_detail: Install via npm; no account/credentials. Runs locally (Puppeteer/Chromium).

name: YouTube Transcript
one_line: Managed API to extract YouTube transcripts plus search, channel and playlist endpoints.
self_serve_detail: Free signup with 100 free credits; API key issued instantly in dashboard (Bearer token). Paid plans only needed when free credits run out; no approval required.
api_surface: REST broad (transcript, info, search, channel, playlist)

name: Grain
one_line: Meeting recorder/intelligence with REST API (v2).
self_serve_detail: PAT + OAuth2 + Workspace tokens self-serve in-app; API access requires a paid Grain plan (Starter+); Free excludes API. No official MCP (community only).
api_surface: REST broad (recordings, transcripts, notes, tags, webhooks)
blocker: API requires a paid Grain plan (Starter+); no official MCP.
